title: Turkish Poppy Seed Fritters
description: Crispy fritters filled with a sweet poppy seed mixture, perfect for a snack or dessert. These fritters originate from Turkish cuisine.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and poppy seeds.
In a separate bowl, whisk together melted butter, egg, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
Cover the dough with plastic wrap and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
Using a cookie scoop, drop the dough into the oil, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve warm.
